type_definitions.name: RenderContractMap
type_definitions.description: Primary port trait driving the contract-map render workflow; exposes execute(cmd) for CLI and future adapters

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapCommand
type_definitions.description: Command input carrying TrackId, optional kind_filter, and optional layer_filter

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapOutput
type_definitions.description: DTO reporting rendered_layer_count and total_entry_count after a successful render

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapError
type_definitions.description: Error variants surfaced by the RenderContractMap primary port

type_definitions.name: RenderContractMapInteractor
type_definitions.description: Interactor implementing RenderContractMap by composing CatalogueLoader, domain render_contract_map free function, and ContractMapWriter
